breadcrumb._comment: OrigamBreadcrumb + OrigamBreadcrumbItem + OrigamBreadcrumbDivider component tokens — Lot 5D. Navigation landmark (<nav>) rendering an ordered list of items separated by dividers. BEM children: items (ol), item (li wrapper), prepend, append. Sibling components: OrigamBreadcrumbItem (the link/span per crumb) and OrigamBreadcrumbDivider (the separator glyph or icon). Each has its own sub-section below.

gap.$description: Gap between items in the ol flex row (spacing is handled by item padding-inline)

padding-block.$description: Block padding of the breadcrumb root container

padding-inline.$description: Inline padding of the breadcrumb root container

font-size.$description: Base font-size for the breadcrumb trail

background.$description: Default background of the breadcrumb root (transparent; the old :root default was rgb(230,230,230) which is now migrated)

color.$description: Default text color of the breadcrumb root (replaces rgba(0,0,0,0.87) from :root block)

border-color.$description: Border color (used when --border variant is active)

border-radius.$description: Default border-radius of the root container

box-shadow-elevated.$description: Box-shadow when --elevated modifier is active (replaces rgba(0,0,0,0.05)+rgba(0,0,0,0.08) hardcoded in scoped style)

transition-property.$description: Transition properties for the root container

transition-duration.$description: Transition duration for the root container

transition-timing-function.$description: Transition easing for the root container

item._comment: BEM: .origam-breadcrumb-item — the individual crumb link or span.

color.$description: Default color of a breadcrumb item (inherit from root)

hover-color.$description: Color on hover for clickable items (link affordance)

active-color.$description: Color of the current page item (last crumb, aria-current=page)

opacity.$description: Default opacity of a breadcrumb item

opacity-disabled.$description: Opacity when the item is disabled

text-decoration.$description: Text decoration (none by default; can override for underlined links)

transition-property.$description: Animated properties for item hover/active transitions

color.$description: Color of the divider character or icon

font-size.$description: Font size of the divider character

character.$description: Default divider character (overridable via the divider prop)

padding-inline.$description: Horizontal padding around the divider (gives breathing room between crumbs)

border-radius.$description: Border radius of the divider wrapper

home-icon._comment: Tokens for an optional home icon prepended to the first breadcrumb item (via the prependIcon prop on OrigamBreadcrumbItem).

color.$description: Color of the home icon (matches primary link color)
